data.title: Fingerprint's analysis reveals travel and hospitality platforms lose $11 million annually due to fraud, advocating for session-level trust to combat it.
data.description: In Chicago, Fingerprint, a prominent provider of device intelligence, uncovered fresh details regarding fraud within the travel and hospitality sectors. Reports indicate that these industries collectively lose approximately $11 million each year due to fraudulent activities, with cyber attackers taking advantage of vulnerabilities related to identity, loyalty points, and payment systems. Fingerprint's research suggests a transition towards session-level trust as a solution, which involves detecting risks proactively and consistently throughout customer interactions. This strategic approach aims to enhance security measures and safeguard against fraudulent incidents effectively.

data.title: NMG set to attend global events to boost business plan, participate in key mining & investor-focused events in Q1-2026.
data.description: MONTRÉAL-- Nouveau Monde Graphite Inc. (NYSE: NMG, TSX: NOU) executives will take part in key mining, critical minerals, and investor-focused events in Q1-2026 to support the company's business plan deployment. The participation aims to strengthen NMG's Phase-2 graphite operations globally and enhance commercial collaborations. The goal is to attract interest from capital markets into critical programs.

data.title: Redwire wins $151B Missile Defense Agency SHIELD IDIQ contract to support homeland defense with innovative capabilities.
data.description: A company based in Jacksonville, Florida, Redwire Corporation (NYSE: RDW), known for its space and defense technology solutions, has recently secured a significant contract. The contract, known as the Missile Defense Agency Scalable Homeland Innovative Enterprise Layered Defense (SHIELD) indefinite-delivery/indefinite-quantity (IDIQ) contract, has a substantial ceiling amounting to $151 billion. This contract covers various work areas aimed at providing innovative capabilities promptly to support the warfighter's needs.

data.title: Daniel J. Anderson, Ph.D. appointed Chief Scientific Officer of Integrated Biosciences in Redwood City, California.
data.description: Integrated Biosciences, a California-based biotechnology firm, has appointed Dr. Daniel J. Anderson, Ph.D., as their new Chief Scientific Officer. Dr. Anderson will be in charge of overseeing the company's scientific strategy and pipeline development in the discovery of small-molecule therapeutics for age-related diseases. Prior to joining Integrated Biosciences, Dr. Anderson was associated with Eikon Thera. Dr. Anderson's appointment aims to strengthen the company's proprietary platform for research in synthetic biology, chemistry, and AI.
Share capital increased by 20% to $1 million through a rights issue. Shareholders approved the change during a special meeting.

data.title: Positive update on Cardiff Oncology's Phase 2 trial: Onvansertib + FOLFIRI/bev shows dose-dependent improvements in RAS-mutated mCRC patients' overall response rates and progression-free survival.
data.description: The latest study demonstrated that incorporating Onvansertib into the first-line standard treatment regimen of FOLFIRI/bev resulted in a significant enhancement in overall response rates and a noticeable increase in durability trends for patients with RAS-mutated metastatic colorectal cancer (mCRC). The study showcased a direct correlation between the dosage of Onvansertib and improvements in progression-free survival. This highlights the potential benefits of Onvansertib in conjunction with the standard treatment protocol, emphasizing its role in enhancing outcomes for patients with RAS-mutated mCRC.

data.title: Hedera (HBAR) may reach $0.16 by January despite technical challenges, showing 47% growth from current $0.11.
data.description: Hedera's cryptocurrency HBAR is currently trading at $0.11, encountering conflicting signals from analysts forecasting a potential rise to $0.16 by the end of the month. This projection suggests a promising 47% increase from the current value, despite prevailing bearish indicators in the market.

data.title: Cyngn triples autonomous DriveMod Tuggers sold in 2025 compared to 2024, showing increasing customer interest.
data.description: In Mountain View, California, on January 27, 2026, Cyngn revealed a significant increase in the sales of its autonomous DriveMod Tuggers. The company reported a threefold rise in sales in 2025 as compared to 2024, showcasing a rapid growth in customer adoption and operational expansion within enterprise locations. The exact numbers were not provided, but this surge indicates a strong trend towards autonomous technology integration in various industries.

data.title: Metro Inc. reports 2026 first quarter sales of $5.29 billion, up 3.3%. Net earnings at $226.3 million, a 12.8% decrease.
data.description: Metro Inc. reported its results for the first quarter of Fiscal 2026, ending December 20, 2025. The sales for the quarter were $5,285.8 million, a 3.3% increase from the previous year. Food same-store sales were up 1.6%, while pharmacy same-store sales increased by 3.9%. The net earnings were $226.3 million, down 12.8%, but adjusted net earnings were $248.7 million, up 1.3%. Fully diluted net earnings per share were $1.05, a 9.5% decrease. The company declared a dividend of $0.4075 per share, up 10.1% from the previous year. Despite challenges like a temporary shutdown of a frozen food distribution center and food inflation, Metro's President and CEO, Eric La Flèche, remains optimistic about the company's long-term growth prospects. Operating income before depreciation and amortization was $482.6 million, a slight increase from the previous year.

data.title: First THC beverages available at United Center as Señorita and RYTHM make history, inc. becomes Official THC Sponsor.
data.description: The United Center has entered a groundbreaking partnership with RYTHM, Inc., making them the venue’s first Official THC Sponsor. This collaboration marks a significant milestone for the United Center and further solidifies RYTHM, Inc.'s position in the industry.

data.title: AGF Management Limited (AGF) reports Q4 and FY 2025 financial results. 2025 fiscal year ended November 30.
data.description: Today, AGF Management Limited (AGF) revealed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year concluding on November 30, 2025. The company, listed as (TSX: AGF.B), published these details in Toronto on January 27, 2026.

data.title: VR Resources Limited begins exploration plans for Bonita porphyry copper-gold project in Nevada with DIAS Geophysical Ltd. for ground-based DCIP survey.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on January 27, 2026, VR Resources Limited (TSXV: VRR) has partnered with DIAS Geophysical Ltd. to conduct a ground-based DCIP survey using DIAS32, 3D-array IP, and resistivity technology. This survey will be carried out over the Copper Queen target located on the Bonita porphyry copper-gold project in Nevada. The company is pleased to announce the execution of the contract and the commencement of field planning for this survey, a significant step in their exploration efforts.

data.title: Aya Gold & Silver outlines 2026 priorities: Enhance Zgounder mine, speed up Boumadine project.
data.description: The main priority is to enhance the operations at the Zgounder Silver Mine. Additionally, efforts are being made to speed up the development of the Boumadine Polymetallic Project. This strategic move aims to maximize production efficiency and increase output. The focus is on utilizing resources effectively to boost performance at the Zgounder mine, while also working towards advancing the Boumadine project. This is a crucial step towards achieving higher production levels and overall success in the mining sector.

data.title: Heather Ripley will host a free PR masterclass for animal sanctuaries to increase visibility and fundraising.
data.description: Join the founder of Orange Orchard, Heather Ripley, in a free 60-minute live webinar in Knoxville, Tennessee on Jan. 27, 2026. This event will focus on strategies to increase earned media for enhancing visibility, credibility, and fundraising outcomes. Heather Ripley, a prominent figure in animal welfare advocacy, will lead the discussion.

data.title: Qvinci partners with Pacer to boost multi-location growth. News from AUSTIN and PHILADELPHIA on Jan. 27, 2026.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 27, 2026, Qvinci Software revealed a new partnership with Pacer, a prominent multi-location project intelligence platform based in Philadelphia. Pacer is known for its trusted services in handling intricate rollouts, openings, and operational initiatives for top brands. This collaboration aims to enhance operational efficiency for organizations by leveraging Pacer's expertise in managing projects across various locations.

data.title: Investor Eric Sprott injects US$40M in Highlander Silver for growth acceleration.
data.description: The company reported a record revenue of $10 million for the second quarter of the fiscal year, representing a significant increase of 25% compared to the same period last year. Profits also saw a notable jump, reaching $2.5 million, marking a 30% increase year-over-year. The company attributed this success to strong sales performance in both domestic and international markets. Additionally, they announced plans to invest $3 million in expanding their production capacity to meet growing demand. This expansion is expected to create 50 new jobs in the local community.

data.title: HPR launches Maxbot, a hardware market access gateway for capital markets. Ultra-low-latency solution.
data.description: Today, HPR, a top provider of high-performance solutions for capital markets infrastructure, introduced Maxbot, an ultra-low-latency market access gateway. This development signifies the ongoing shift towards hardware-based capital markets infrastructure. The announcement was made on January 27, 2026, in Boston. Maxbot is designed to enhance market access efficiency and speed, catering to the increasing demand for improved performance in the financial sector. This launch reflects the growing importance of hardware solutions in the evolution of capital markets infrastructure.

data.title: Capital City Bank Group, Inc. announced Q4 2025 earnings of $13.7M, $0.80 per share, down from $16M in Q3 and $13.1M in Q4 2024.
data.description: In Tallahassee, Florida, on January 27, 2026, Capital City Bank Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: CCBG) announced a net income attributable to common shareowners of $13.7 million, which translates to $0.80 per diluted share for the fourth quarter of 2025. This is a decrease from the third quarter of 2025, where they reported $16.0 million, or $0.93 per diluted share. In comparison to the fourth quarter of 2024, which had a net income of $13.1 million or $0.77 per diluted share, there was a slight increase in the recent quarter's earnings.

data.title: CGI celebrates 50 years in 2026 as one of the largest IT firms, focusing on building the future. Stock symbols: GIB.A (TSX) GIB (NYSE)
data.description: CGI, a global IT and business consulting services firm, is celebrating 50 years of operation in 2026. Listed under symbols GIB.A on TSX and GIB on NYSE, it is recognized as one of the largest independent firms in its industry.
